REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON DEMURRER; PROOF OF SERVICE IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO (1) ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY; (2) ALLEGE ALL ELEMENTS OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUIET TITLE; (3) ALLEGE WHAT AMOUNTS, IF ANY, PROVIDED TO THE DEFENDANTS WERE TO BE USED AS AN INVESTMENT (I.E. TOWARDS PLAINTIFFS' ALLEGED OWNERSHIP CLAIM, PARTIAL OR OTHERWISE) AND WHAT AMOUNTS WERE TO BE USED AS A LOAN (I.E. TO BE REPAID BY DEFENDANTS). DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE SAMUEL K. FENG, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Plaintiffs Failure To Amend Complaint After Demurrer Was Sustained And Request For Entry Of Judgment Of Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Arasto Farsad In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Nancy Wang, 408.641.9966 Defendant Jiawei Jian.
Wndy Lun, 408.903.9799 Planitff Xiamei Feng.

Argued by Plainitffs Counsel Wendy Lun. MS. Lun states that she is making a request for relief under CCP 473(b).

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN'S Motion To Dismiss Action For Plaintiffs Failure To Amend Complaint After Demurrer Was Sustained And Request For Entry Of Judgment Of Dismissal is Denied. Excusable as to 473(b). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Arasto Farsad, 408.641.9966 for Defendant Jiawei Jian.
Wendy Lun, 408.903.9799 for Plaintiff Xiaomei Feng.

Argued. Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege fraud with requisite specificity; (2) allege all elements of the cause of action for quiet title; (3) allege what amounts, if any, provided to the defendants were to be used as an investment (i.e. towards Plaintiffs' alleged ownership claim, partial or otherwise) and what amounts were to be used as a loan (i.e. to be repaid by Defendants). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Continued To Mar-12-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer is continued to March 12, 2020 to provide parties a final opportunity to submit ALL courtesy copies. The Court received a Courtesy copy of the Demurrer filed on May 15, 2019 and Amended Notice of Demurrer filed on January 7, 2020. No courtesy copy of the opposition or the operative complaint was received. Courtesy copy of the opposition and the operative complaint to be delivered to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than February 14, 2020 by 4:00 p.m.
Judge Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service is CONTINUED to February 13, 2020 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501 for the parties to provide courtesy copies in compliant with Local Rule 2.7(B).
